attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
  1 AS BATCH_ID
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID
, COALESCE(CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,-9999) AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID
, COALESCE(CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,-999) AS CODE_COMBINATION_ID
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.LAST_UPDATED_BY
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.CREATION_DATE
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.CREATED_BY
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.LINE_PERCENT
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.AMOUNT
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.GL_DATE
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.GL_POSTED_DATE
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.CUST_TRX_LINE_SALESREP_ID
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.COMMENTS
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.ATTRIBUTE1
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.ATTRIBUTE2
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.ATTRIBUTE3
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.ATTRIBUTE4
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.ATTRIBUTE5
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.ATTRIBUTE6
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.ATTRIBUTE7
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.ATTRIBUTE8
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.ATTRIBUTE9
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.ATTRIBUTE10
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.REQUEST_ID
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.PROGRAM_ID
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.CONCATENATED_SEGMENTS
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.ORIGINAL_GL_DATE
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.POST_REQUEST_ID
, -7777 AS POSTING_CONTROL_ID
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.RA_POST_LOOP_NUMBER
, COALESCE(CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,-9999) AS CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.ACCOUNT_SET_FLAG
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.ACCTD_AMOUNT
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE_CONTEXT
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.ATTRIBUTE11
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.ATTRIBUTE12
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.ATTRIBUTE13
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.ATTRIBUTE14
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.ATTRIBUTE15
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.LATEST_REC_FLAG
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.ORG_ID
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.MRC_ACCOUNT_CLASS
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.MRC_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.MRC_AMOUNT
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.MRC_GL_POSTED_DATE
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.MRC_POSTING_CONTROL_ID
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.MRC_ACCTD_AMOUNT
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.COLLECTED_TAX_CCID
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.COLLECTED_TAX_CONCAT_SEG
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.REVENUE_ADJUSTMENT_ID
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.REV_ADJ_CLASS_TEMP
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.REC_OFFSET_FLAG
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.EVENT_ID
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.USER_GENERATED_FLAG
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.ROUNDING_CORRECTION_FLAG
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.COGS_REQUEST_ID
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.CCID_CHANGE_FLAG
, CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME 
, 'CDC' AS GLOBAL_NAME
, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME
, 'I' AS ACTION_CODE 
FROM
(
SELECT * FROM $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST
WHERE ORG_ID NOT IN (SEL ORG_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_ENABLED_ORG)
AND SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= '$$LastExtractDate' 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1
)CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST
WHERE CDC_RA_CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
